app.title: FD Advisor
app.tagline: Your trusted guide to Fixed Deposits

languageSelect.title: Choose Your Language
languageSelect.subtitle: Select how you'd like to chat

mobileAuth.title: Welcome to FD Advisor
mobileAuth.subtitle: Enter your mobile number to get started
mobileAuth.error: Please enter a valid 10-digit mobile number

chat.welcome: Hello! I'm your FD Advisor. I'll help you understand Fixed Deposit offers in simple words. How can I help you today?
chat.askForOffer: Sure, I can help! Please share the FD offer details you received, and I'll explain it in simple terms.
chat.offerExplanation:
Let me break this down for you:

**Bank:** Suryoday Small Finance Bank (a trusted RBI-regulated bank)

**Interest Rate:** 8.50% p.a. means for every ₹100 you invest, you'll earn ₹8.50 profit each year.

**Tenure:** 12M tenor means your money stays deposited for 12 months (1 year).

This is a good rate! Let me show you exactly how much you can earn:
chat.calculatorIntro: Use the slider below to see your potential earnings:
chat.bookingPrompt: Would you like to book this FD right now? I can guide you through it in just 2 minutes!
chat.collectName: Great! Let's get started. What's your full name as per your PAN card?
chat.collectPan: Perfect! Now, please share your PAN card number (e.g., ABCDE1234F)
chat.collectNominee: Almost done! Who would you like to nominate for this FD?
chat.bookingSuccess: Congratulations! Your FD booking is confirmed. You'll receive a confirmation SMS shortly.
chat.noWorries: No problem! Feel free to ask me any other questions about Fixed Deposits. I'm here to help!

jargon.paRate: **p.a. (Per Annum)** means 'per year'. So 8.50% p.a. means you earn 8.50% interest on your money every year. For example, if you invest ₹10,000, you'll earn about ₹850 as interest in one year.
jargon.tenor: **Tenor** means how long your money stays in the Fixed Deposit. 12M means 12 months, which is 1 year. You cannot withdraw your money before this period without penalty.
jargon.maturity: **Maturity Amount** is the total money you'll receive when your FD period ends. This includes your original investment plus all the interest earned.
jargon.compound: **Compound Interest** means you earn interest on your interest too! Your money grows faster because the bank calculates interest on the increased amount.
jargon.fdInsurance: Your FD is insured up to ₹5 lakhs by DICGC (Deposit Insurance). Even if something happens to the bank, your money up to ₹5 lakhs is safe.

success.title: Booking Confirmed!
success.subtitle: Your FD booking request has been received
success.callbackInfo: Our team will call you within 24 hours to complete the booking
